results.title: BEST Wet-Lease Buses Under Scanner After 249 Accidents, Experts Demand Safety Reforms And Accountability
results.description: The issue assumes greater significance because contractor-operated buses now dominate BEST's fleet. Of the undertaking's 2,801 buses, 2,553 are operated by private contractors, while only 249 are owned and operated by BEST. Wet-lease buses operate on 349 of Mumbai's 400 routes and undertake more than 25,700 trips every day, making them the backbone of the city's bus transport network.
